summary: Plan-only remediation inventory over five independent open PRs. #92294 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation marked it security-sensitive; no ProjectClownfish fix or merge path is emitted for that PR. No merge_candidate is safe for the remaining PRs because the artifact does not contain complete merge preflight proof, especially current Codex /review pass evidence and resolved review-bot findings. #56145 also has failing proof. No cluster-wide fix artifact is safe because the remaining PRs are unrelated and would need separate repair jobs.
